title: Studique
desc: One of my most impactful projects is a full-stack digital campus hub used by 15,000+ SRM students, bringing resources, attendance, and more into one platform.

title: GetItDone
desc: A full-stack anonymous freelancing marketplace. The idea is to make hiring private, fair, and transparent through an escrow-based system.

title: Interact
desc: An iOS product designed to simplify how hackathons are discovered and managed. It’s still evolving, but the focus has always been on clarity and ease of use

title: SRM GPA
desc: A live web tool that helps students calculate SGPA, track CGPA, and predict results without confusion.

title: IRCTC Redesign
desc: A design concept focused on rethinking one of India’s most frustrating booking experiences.

title: Morph
desc: A design concept that experiments with transforming photos into clean, morph-based face designs.

title: SRMConnect
desc: A full-stack database platform for SRM clubs to manage members, records, and operations more smoothly.

title: Play Store Visuals
desc: Beyond products, I’ve designed Play Store Visuals for BluePicks focused assets aimed at increasing conversion on the Play Store.

title: Brand Visuals
desc: Finally, Brand Visuals brings together my visual design work across posters, Instagram creatives, merchandise, and campaign assets.
